channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'The Office' star criticizes political 'hypocrisy,' says sitcom couldn't air today
item.description: Rainn Wilson argues cancel culture would prevent The Office from being made now, blaming partisan hypocrisy on both sides.

item.title: Rural support for Trump declines as fuel and food costs rise, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds
item.description: Brian Rauch feels the pinch of higher gas prices on his long drives from rural Montana, reflecting broader economic concerns.

item.title: Special edition of 'Reagan' biopic returns to theaters for America250 celebration
Trump endorses MAGA candidate Mike Collins in Georgia's Republican Senate runoff
item.description: Trump backs Rep. Mike Collins against Derek Dooley, who is supported by Gov. Kemp, in the upcoming Georgia Senate runoff.
